cards.title: OpenAI Proposes 5% Equity Donation to US Wealth Fund
cards.body: CEO Sam Altman has proposed giving 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about public participation in AI boom gains.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Deployment Company with $2.5B
cards.body: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group and $2.5 billion commitment.

cards.title: Indian Tech Tycoon Builds AI Microsoft Office Alternative
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is investing $30M of his own money into Neo, an AI-powered enterprise software platform taking on Microsoft Office and Google Apps.

cards.title: SpaceX Shows Investors Phone-Like AI Device Prototype
cards.body: SpaceX reportedly demonstrated a "handset-like" AI device to investors before going public, signaling potential expansion into wireless.

cards.title: Ashton Kutcher Launches New VC Firm with Morgan Beller
cards.body: Kutcher is leaving Sound Ventures to launch a new fund focused on AI infrastructure and energy powering AI companies.

cards.title: Cloudflare Requires AI Companies Pay for Publisher Content
cards.body: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate search crawlers from AI training crawlers, or risk being blocked on publisher sites.

cards.title: Venice AI Reaches Unicorn Status with $65M Series A
cards.body: Privacy-first AI platform Venice AI achieved unicorn valuation while already profitable with over $70 million annualized run-rate revenue.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Now Available on Mac
cards.body: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant Gemini Spark expands to Mac with real-time tracking and support for more applications.

cards.title: Meta Developing Cloud Infrastructure Business for AI Compute
cards.body: Meta is building a cloud infrastructure business to sell AI compute power and models, competing directly with AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure.

cards.title: Trump Administration Drops Anthropic Model Restrictions
cards.body: The Trump administration lifted restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models, reflecting erratic AI policy guidance across the industry.

cards.title: Wayve Launches $85M Employee Tender at $8.5B Valuation
cards.body: Autonomous vehicle company Wayve's employee tender offer reflects growing trend of AI startups using equity offerings for talent retention.

cards.title: OpenClaw Now Available on Android and iOS
cards.body: The free open-source agentic program expands beyond desktop to mobile platforms.

cards.title: Ex-DeepMind Researchers' EquiLibre Valued Above $500M
cards.body: Three former DeepMind researchers founded EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab now valued over $500 million, building AI for quant hedge funds.

cards.title: Google Releases Faster, Cheaper Nano Banana 2 Lite
cards.body: Google's updated image generator prioritizes speed and cost efficiency, making AI content creation more accessible for creators.

cards.title: Nvidia Competitor Etched Hits $5B Valuation Milestone
cards.body: AI chip competitor Etched reached $5B valuation with $1 billion in booked contracts for its inference systems.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Sonnet 5 for Cheaper Agents
cards.body: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers stronger agentic capabilities and lower pricing, positioning it as a cost-effective alternative to Opus and Gemini Pro.

cards.title: Acti Puts AI Agents Directly Into Smartphone Keyboard
cards.body: Startup Acti launches iOS and Android keyboard with AI assistants, enabling custom AI shortcuts across apps using natural language.

cards.title: OpenAI proposes 5% equity donation to US wealth fund
cards.body: Sam Altman has proposed giving 5% of OpenAI's equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund. The move aims to let the public share in financial gains from the AI boom.

cards.title: Microsoft launches AI deployment company with $2.5B
cards.body: Microsoft has launched its own AI deployment group, following similar moves by Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The company is committing $2.5 billion to the venture.

cards.title: Indian tech tycoon builds AI alternative to Office
cards.body: Bhavin Turakhia is betting $30 million to build Neo, an AI-powered alternative to Microsoft Office and Google Apps. This is his fifth venture focused on enterprise software.

cards.title: Cloudflare pushes AI companies to pay for content
cards.body: Cloudflare is requiring AI companies to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training by September 15. Companies that don't comply risk being blocked on many publisher sites.

cards.title: Venice AI becomes unicorn with $65M Series A
cards.body: Privacy-first AI platform Venice AI has reached unicorn status with its Series A funding. The company is already profitable with over $70 million in annualized run-rate revenues.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark arrives on Mac with updates
cards.body: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant Gemini Spark is now available on Mac. Updates include real-time tracking and support for more applications.

cards.title: Meta develops cloud infrastructure for AI compute
cards.body: Meta is building plans for a cloud infrastructure business selling AI compute power and models. The move would compete directly with Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

cards.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic AI models
cards.body: The Trump administration has lifted restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models. The erratic approach to AI policy has left companies unclear about future model release governance.

cards.title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender at $8.5B
cards.body: Wayve is offering an $85 million employee tender offer at an $8.5 billion valuation. The move reflects a growing trend of AI startups using tenders to attract and retain talent.

cards.title: OpenClaw finally available on Android and iOS
cards.body: The free open-source agentic program OpenClaw has launched on mobile platforms. It's now accessible as both an Android and iOS application.

cards.title: DeepMind trio building poker AI now worth $500M
cards.body: Three ex-DeepMind researchers founded EquiLibre Technologies, an AI lab making money for quant hedge funds. The Prague-based company is now valued at over $500 million.

cards.title: Google launches faster, cheaper image generator
cards.body: Google has updated its image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite, making it faster and cheaper. The improvements make it more useful for creators producing AI content.

cards.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation
cards.body: Etched, an Nvidia AI chip competitor, has reached a $5 billion valuation. The company says it has already booked $1 billion in contracts for its inference systems.

cards.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 for agents
cards.body: Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety. It positions itself as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

cards.title: Acti puts AI agents in smartphone keyboard
cards.body: Acti has integrated AI agents directly into a new iOS and Android keyboard. Users can create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language across all apps.

cards.title: Achieving operational excellence with AI
cards.body: Frameworks like Lean Six Sigma and business process management are gaining new relevance with AI integration. AI is bringing structured clarity and statistical rigor to operational chaos.

cards.title: Teaching AI to run turbines intelligently
cards.body: AI's most consequential use cases are unfolding in industrial settings far from consumer chatbots. In industries with critical infrastructure and safety needs, AI is transforming operations.

cards.title: Startup tackles LLM groupthink problem
cards.body: A new startup is addressing the issue of large language models being stuck in predictable patterns. LLMs like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini consistently produce the same responses to identical prompts.

cards.title: LLMs trapped in groupthink; startup finds solution
cards.body: Chatbots consistently produce identical answers to the same prompts, demonstrating groupthink limitations. A new startup is working to break this predictable pattern in language models.

cards.title: Claude Science launched by Anthropic
cards.body: Anthropic announced Claude Science as a major new product supporting scientific research. Like Claude Code for software engineering, Claude Science can autonomously assist pharmaceutical and biotech researchers.

cards.title: AI agents are not your coworkers
cards.body: AI agents entering the workplace raise questions about their role and expectations. Unlike human colleagues, these AI systems have fundamentally different capabilities and limitations.

cards.title: Agriculture ready for AI despite data gaps
cards.body: AI is transforming agriculture's possibilities for managing fertilizer costs and unpredictable weather. Industry leaders must lay data groundwork before investing in AI solutions.

cards.title: Google's AI buildout drives 37% electricity surge
cards.body: Google's AI infrastructure expansion caused a 37% increase in electricity use in 2025. The company's growing computational demands are significantly impacting its energy consumption.

cards.title: Anthropic AI models get global release after testing
cards.body: After safety testing efforts that spanned international discussions, Anthropic's AI models have received global release approval. The company's models are now available worldwide.
